title: LagCleanX
description: LagCleanX is a lightweight and efficient lag management plugin designed to keep your Minecraft server running smoothly. It periodically removes unnecessary entities, clears dropped items, and provides customizable cleanup settings to ensure Good Gameplay
body:
LagCleanX is a lightweight and efficient lag management plugin designed to keep your Minecraft server running smoothly. It periodically removes unnecessary entities, clears dropped items, and provides customizable cleanup settings to ensure stable performance without interrupting gameplay.

LagCleanX is built for simplicity, speed, and reliability. Whether you're running a small SMP or a large public server, this plugin helps reduce lag spikes and maintain optimal server performance.

Features

- Automatically clears dropped items and unused entities

- Configurable cleanup intervals and messages

- Safe removal system to avoid affecting important gameplay elements

- Supports both survival and creative server environments

- Designed to be lightweight with minimal resource usage


Why LagCleanX? LagCleanX focuses on performance first. No complicated setup, no bloated features—just clean, efficient server optimization.

Compatibility

# Works on Paper And Spigot

Supports modern Minecraft versions


Ideal For

SMPs

Anarchy servers

Mini-game servers

Any server that wants reduced lag and smoother gameplay
